title: Imprisoned
description: Adds the prison realm from JJK to Minecraft
body:
Adds the Prison Realm and Back Gate to Minecraft. They are currently unobtainable in survival.

Prison Realm: Sends a player that gets right clicked to a seperate dimension, in here you can't die to get out and the walls are unbreakable.

Back Gate: Frees the player in the Prison Realm, putting them at the location where the gate was used.

Prison Realm and Back Gate textures
![Prison Realm and Back Gate textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf29efab5800844e267ae16c354996da88830415.png)

Interior of the Prison Realm

![Interior of the Prison Realm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/597ff0acd19fc5802ed0531c7682d189c0454834_0.webp)

Kenjaku skin used for thumbnail: [https://www.planetminecraft.com/skin/suguru-geto-kenjaku-jujutsu-kaisen/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/skin/suguru-geto-kenjaku-jujutsu-kaisen/)
